ddls:
CREATE TABLE "donors" (
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each donor */,
  "donor_name" TEXT /* Full name or organization name of the donor */,
  "donor_type" TEXT /* Type of the donor (e.g., PERSONA NATURAL, PERSONA JURIDICA) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the donor */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the donor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the donor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the donor's address */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the donor's address */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the donor's address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the donor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the donor record was last updated */,
  "tax_id" TEXT /* Tax identification number for the donor */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the donor */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Employer of the donor */,
  "is_individual" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the donor is an individual (true) or an organization (false) */,
  "donation_limit" REAL /* Legal donation limit for the donor */,
  "total_donations" REAL /* Total amount donated by the donor */,
  "last_donation_date" TEXT /* Date of the last donation */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the donor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("donor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "candidate_type" TEXT /* Type of the candidate (e.g., CANDIDATO) */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party the candidate is affiliated with */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the candidate is running for */,
  "election_year" TEXT /* Year of the election */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the candidate record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the candidate record was last updated */,
  "district" TEXT /* The district the candidate is running in */,
  "incumbent" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "social_media_handles" TEXT /* Social media handles of the candidate */,
  "total_received" REAL /* Total amount of contributions received by the candidate */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the candidate */,
  "financial_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the candidate's financial report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the candidate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the political party */,
  "party_leader" TEXT /* Name of the party leader */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the party */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the party */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the party headquarters */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the party headquarters */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the party headquarters */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the party headquarters */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the party record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the party record was last updated */,
  "founding_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "total_members" INTEGER /* Total number of members in the party */,
  "total_donations" REAL /* Total amount of donations received by the party */,
  "total_spent" REAL /* Total amount spent by the party */,
  "financial_report_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's financial report */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "donor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the donor who made the contribution */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate who received the contribution */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction record was last updated */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., donation, refund) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., check, credit card, bank transfer) */,
  "transaction_status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., pending, completed, refunded) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_donor_id FOREIGN KEY ("donor_id") REFERENCES donors ("donor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, auditor) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user record was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "failed_login_attempts" INTEGER /* Number of failed login attempts */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time of the last password change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed (e.g., donor, candidate, transaction) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access log record was created */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., financial, compliance) */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the report file in MB */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the report period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the report period */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
